subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for reaching out from Vendor Inc. Following up from the conference sounds great.

I can propose the following time slots for a meeting:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which works best for your team.

Regarding your request for internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to share internal contact information. For public information about our leadership team, please visit our website at https://company.internal/about.

Thanks and looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
